text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Takarazuka Kinen is finally here.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It seems a great many people have turned out to
root for me today.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
And that reporter who often writes about me is
among them.
choice_data_list: Go show them the new you!
Go show them the new you!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
My determination and steadfast progress... I'll
show them all what I can do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ready to go, Grass Wonder leaves the waiting
room beaming with energy.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Spe. Let's have a good race today.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I-I'm so glad I ran into you before the race!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, wow... Spe, you're stiff as a board.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Remember, only those recognized and elected by
the fans are able to run in the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Plenty of people have come here to support you
today, so why not take pride in that?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha... Yeah, I do really appreciate their
support.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But, with you and the others here, I feel like I'm
so, so out of my league.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's that time already! We have to go!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes. Let's both go out there and give it our all.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You can accomplish anything if you put your mind
to it. But you'll accomplish nothing if you don't
try.
